---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a hook, agent, command, or skill that isn't working correctly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Component

Which component is affected?

- [ ] Hook (PreToolUse / PostToolUse)
- [ ] Agent (arch-reviewer / perf-reviewer / e2e-runner / tdd-guide)
- [ ] Command (specify which `/command`)
- [ ] Skill (specify which skill)
- [ ] Output Style (Learning Plus)
- [ ] MCP Server Config
- [ ] Other

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `claude ...`
2. Use `/command` or trigger hook by ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or hook output.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., macOS 15.2, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Claude Code version: [e.g., 1.0.20]
- Node.js version: [e.g., 22.x]
- Shell: [e.g., zsh, bash]

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or log output.
